latest.title: Shawn Ryan Tests a Full Auto M249 and a 40mm Grenade Launcher
latest.desc:
Shawn Ryan heads back to the range to run a lineup of full auto weapons. A full auto Glock, the Maxim 9 suppressed 9mm, an M249 SAW, and a 40mm grenade launcher.

It's been close to 15 years since Shawn has been behind some of these weapons. In another lifetime, he reviewed firearms for a living. No
